## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / workflow phase
- [ ] Scaffold or template change

## Checklist

- [ ] `bash tests/run.sh` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Branch and commits follow the [contributing conventions](CONTRIBUTING.md)
